highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.116.1 fixes a NuGet packaging issue and updates the Android NDK to r27c.

bullets.detail: An incorrect PackagePath attribute was causing issues with NuGet package layout; this is now fixed.

bullets.lead: Android NDK updated to r27c with 16 KB alignment
bullets.detail: The Android NDK is updated to r27c, adding support for the 16 KB memory page alignment required by newer Android devices.

harfbuzz_summary: Packages the HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0.1 binding with the packaging and NDK fixes from this release.
